title: notholaena sinuata var. cochisensis
intro: Notholaena sinuata var. cochisensis, also known as Cochis fern, is a variety of Notholaena sinuata, a species of fern native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cochis fern include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, Cochis fern is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be applied topically to skin conditions and wounds.
